.gitignore.general_idea: Add Eclipse-specific IDE files to the gitignore list.
Add Maven build output directory to the gitignore list.
Add release properties file to the gitignore list.

lowcode.model/pom.xml.general_idea: Introduce a parent POM to centralize dependency and plugin management.
Remove explicit version from lombok dependency to inherit from parent.
Remove explicit version from gson dependency to inherit from parent.
Remove explicit version from commons-lang3 dependency to inherit from parent.
Remove explicit version from commons-io dependency to inherit from parent.
Replace junit-jupiter-engine with junit-jupiter-api for test scope.
Replace junit-platform-runner with junit-jupiter-engine for test scope.
Remove explicit version from equalsverifier-nodep dependency to inherit from parent.
Remove local maven-compiler-plugin configuration to inherit from parent.
Remove local properties block to inherit from parent.

lowcode.model/src/main/java/de/zeb/lowco.general_idea: Add new enum constants to the Datentyp enumeration to support additional data types.
lowcode.model/src/main/java/de/zeb/lowco.before: ID, TEXT, GANZZAHL, PROZENTZAHL, GELD_BETRAG, BASISPUNKT, ZAHL, BOOLEAN, TEXT_JN, DATUM, ZEITSTEMPEL, ENTITAET, URL
lowcode.model/src/main/java/de/zeb/lowco.after: ID, TEXT, GANZZAHL, GANZZAHL_ERWEITERT, PROZENTZAHL, GELD_BETRAG, BASISPUNKT, ZAHL, BOOLEAN, TEXT_JN, DATUM, ZEITSTEMPEL, ENTITAET, URL, ZEITPUNKT_LETZTE_AENDERUNG, ZEITPUNKT_ERSTELLUNG, ERSTELLT_VON, MODIFIZIERT_VON, VERSION, BINARY

lowcode.model/src/main/java/de/zeb/lowco.general_idea: Replace deprecated Apache Commons Lang3 StringUtils.equals with Strings.CS.equals for case-sensitive string comparison.
Add import for org.apache.commons.lang3.Strings to support the new API usage.
Remove unused import of Apache Commons Lang3 StringUtils.
Make Entitaet implement the EntitaetreferenzIf interface to enforce contract compliance.
Add a new field dbIndex to the Entitaet class to support database index configuration.
Remove helper methods getNameCapitalized and getNameUncapitalized that relied on the removed StringUtils dependency.
Add method getEntitaetreferenz to satisfy the EntitaetreferenzIf interface contract.
Update Javadoc comment for eigenstaendig field to include DDD context.
lowcode.model/src/main/java/de/zeb/lowco.after:
/** * Definiert, ob eine Enitität eigenständig existiert oder nur als Kind einer anderen Entität. *

* Äquivalent zu Aggregate in DDD */

lowcode.model/src/main/java/de/zeb/lowco.general_idea: Add a fetch type field with a default value to control JPA loading behavior.
Add a cascade type field with a default value to control JPA persistence propagation.
Add a new field 'fachlichEindeutig' to the Entitaetsfeld class to support business uniqueness constraints.
Add a new field 'alsTabelle' to the Entitaetsfeld class to support table-based representation.
Reformat field declarations to align assignment operators for improved code readability.
Refactor field types from MaskenEntitaet/MaskenEntitaetsfeld to Entitaet/Entitaetsfeld to align with a unified entity model.
lowcode.model/src/main/java/de/zeb/lowco.before: public final MaskenEntitaet entitaet; public final List<MaskenEntitaetsfeld> parameterFelder;
lowcode.model/src/main/java/de/zeb/lowco.after: public final Entitaet entitaet; public final List<Entitaetsfeld> parameterFelder;

lowcode.model/src/main/java/de/zeb/lowco.general_idea: Adjust whitespace alignment for field declarations to maintain consistent code formatting.

lowcode.model/src/test/java/de/zeb/lowco.general_idea: Refactor domain model classes from UI-specific wrappers to core domain entities.
Update builder method names to reflect the new domain model structure.
Update third-party library namespace in test configuration.
Remove unused imports for UI model classes that are no longer instantiated in the test.
Rename test method and helper method to reflect the shift from UI model testing to domain model testing.
Rename private helper method to align with new test focus.
Remove code constructing UI components (Checkbox, Dropdown, MaskeGridItems, UiModelReact) as the test now focuses only on the DomainModel.
lowcode.model/src/test/java/de/zeb/lowco.before:
Checkbox aktiv = Checkbox.builder()
                .feld( feldAktiv )
                .label( "Nachverarbeitung aktiv" )
                .build();
        Dropdown turnus = Dropdown.builder()
                .feld( feldRegelturnus )
                .label( feldRegelturnus.getFachlicherName() )
                .build();
        Dropdown ultimo = Dropdown.builder()
                .feld( feldUltimo )
                .label( feldUltimo.getFachlicherName() )
                .tooltip( "Bankarbeitstage nach Ultimo" )
                .build();
        MaskeGridItems maske1 = MaskeGridItems.builder()
                .titel( "DVV Nachtverarbeitung" )
                .name( "einstellungnachtverarbeitung" )
                .url("/einstellungnachtverarbeitung")
                .pfad( "01 Grundeinstellungen" ).pfad( "DVV Nachtverarbeitung" )
                .element( aktiv )
                .element( turnus )
                .element( ultimo )
                .build();
        UiModelReact ui = UiModelReact.builder()
                .apiPagesFile( "J:\\temp\\generated\\api\\index.generated.ts" )
                .maske( maske1 )
                .build();

lowcode.model/src/test/java/de/zeb/lowco.general_idea: Remove the .ui( ui ) call from the LowCodeModel builder since the UI model is no longer constructed.
